domain: ethology + statistical mechanics (joint: termite stigmergy + Brownian-ratchet thermodynamics)
specific_mechanism: stigmergy (indirect coordination via shared environment state) JOINTLY with information-ratchet (one-way thermodynamic commitment on each shared-state edit) — neither alone, only their conjunction is the claim
llm_application: LLM multi-agent coordination on a shared persistent artifact where each agent's edit is structurally append-only / monotone, so coordination signals build via stigmergy without need for explicit messages AND no agent can undo prior work
novelty_claim: Stigmergy alone is well-mapped to LLM multi-agent systems (CodeCRDT 2510.18893, Ledger-State Stigmergy 2604.03997, Emergent Collective Memory 2512.10166). The ratchet-thermodynamic framing alone is published in physics. The JOINT claim — that stigmergy without an explicit append-only commit-ratchet on the shared state is unstable and that LLM multi-agent systems should be designed with both — is the novelty claim.
